text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma la sahla illa ma jaAAaltahu sahla, wa-anta tajAAalul- hazana in shi'ta sahla.)
text.translated: (O Allah, there is no ease except in that which You have made easy, and You make the difficulty, if You wish, easy.)

title: Invocation for when you find something becoming difficult for you
